features: Do you still need a beautiful decoration for the children's birthday? Then this article, from Procos, is just the thing for you
Included is a Disney Princess flag banner with a length of 2.3 metres. The individual paper flags each have a size of approx. 18 x 25 cm
The flag banner is made of paper and can be attached to walls, lamps or trees
Combine the banner with matching Procos disposable tableware (not included) to complete the party decoration
description: Product description Do you still need a beautiful decoration for the children's birthday? Then this item from Procos is just the thing. Included is a Disney Princess flag banner with a length of 2.3 metres. Each paper flags measure approximately 18 x 25 cm. The flag banner is made of paper and can be attached to walls, lamps or trees. Combine the banner with matching Procos disposable tableware (not included) to complete the party decoration. Further items from Procos can be found in our brand shop. Click on the brand name Procos below the product title. Safety Warning Choking hazard: Keep out of reach of children under 3 years. Do not use near heat sources or open flames. Always supervise children when using this product.
